_comment: schema.json — Graph Data Schema for react-force-graph-3d
This defines the exact JSON structure the React frontend expects.
NODES: Each file in the repository becomes a node (a sphere in 3D).
- id:      Relative file path — used as unique key. react-force-graph
matches link.source/target to node.id to draw edges.
- label:   Short filename shown as a floating label in 3D space.
- size:    Visual sphere size. Scale by import count for 'heat map'.
- summary: AI-generated description, populated on-click via Deepmind.
Starts as null — filled lazily to avoid API rate limits.
LINKS: Each import/require/#include creates a link (a 3D line/edge).
- source:  The file that contains the import statement.
